'''âf-g-h''' ('''kafagah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:moonwalk|moonwalk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-g-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:moonwalk|moonwalk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-g-h
|-
! Lemma
| kafagah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifagah|thifagah]] || [[word:jifagah|jifagah]] || [[word:shifagah|shifagah]] || [[word:kifagah|kifagah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufagah|thuthufagah]] || [[word:jujufagah|jujufagah]] || [[word:shushufagah|shushufagah]] || [[word:kukufagah|kukufagah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufagah|thufagah]] || [[word:jufagah|jufagah]] || [[word:shufagah|shufagah]] || [[word:kufagah|kufagah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufagah|thufagah]] || [[word:jufagah|jufagah]] || [[word:shufagah|shufagah]] || [[word:kufagah|kufagah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefagah|thefagah]] || [[word:jefagah|jefagah]] || [[word:shefagah|shefagah]] || [[word:kefagah|kefagah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofagah|thothofagah]] || [[word:jojofagah|jojofagah]] || [[word:shoshofagah|shoshofagah]] || [[word:kokofagah|kokofagah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofagah|thofagah]] || [[word:jofagah|jofagah]] || [[word:shofagah|shofagah]] || [[word:kofagah|kofagah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofagah|thofagah]] || [[word:jofagah|jofagah]] || [[word:shofagah|shofagah]] || [[word:kofagah|kofagah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfagah|thĂŠfagah]] || [[word:jĂŠfagah|jĂŠfagah]] || [[word:shĂŠfagah|shĂŠfagah]] || [[word:kĂŠfagah|kĂŠfagah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafagah|thathafagah]] || [[word:jajafagah|jajafagah]] || [[word:shashafagah|shashafagah]] || [[word:kakafagah|kakafagah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafagah|thafagah]] || [[word:jafagah|jafagah]] || [[word:shafagah|shafagah]] || [[word:kafagah|kafagah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafagah|thafagah]] || [[word:jafagah|jafagah]] || [[word:shafagah|shafagah]] || [[word:kafagah|kafagah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafagah|shafagah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafagah|goshafagah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafagah|gokishafagah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafagahnĂŒ|shafagahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafagahnknĂŒ|goshafagahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafagahnĂŒ|gokishafagahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafagahshĂ«|shafagahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafagahnkshĂ«|goshafagahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafagahshĂ«|gokishafagahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafagahro|shafagahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafagahnkro|goshafagahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafagahro|gokishafagahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafagahmu|shafagahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafagahnkmu|goshafagahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafagahmu|gokishafagahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafagahsher|shafagahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafagahnksher|goshafagahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafagahsher|gokishafagahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafagahng|shafagahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafagahnkng|goshafagahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafagahng|gokishafagahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafagahya|shafagahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafagahnkya|goshafagahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafagahya|gokishafagahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafagahyam|shafagahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafagahnkyam|goshafagahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafagahyam|gokishafagahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafagahnĂŒshĂ«|shafagahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafagahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshafagahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafagahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishafagahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafagahnĂŒro|shafagahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafagahnknĂŒro|goshafagahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafagahnĂŒro|gokishafagahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafagahnĂŒmu|shafagahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafagahnknĂŒmu|goshafagahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafagahnĂŒmu|gokishafagahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafagahshĂ«nĂŒ|shafagahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafagahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshafagahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafagahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishafagahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafagahshĂ«ro|shafagahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafagahnkshĂ«ro|goshafagahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafagahshĂ«ro|gokishafagahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafagahshĂ«mu|shafagahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafagahnkshĂ«mu|goshafagahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafagahshĂ«mu|gokishafagahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafagahronĂŒ|shafagahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafagahnkronĂŒ|goshafagahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafagahronĂŒ|gokishafagahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafagahroshĂ«|shafagahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafagahnkroshĂ«|goshafagahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafagahroshĂ«|gokishafagahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafagahromu|shafagahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafagahnkromu|goshafagahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafagahromu|gokishafagahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafagahmunĂŒ|shafagahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafagahnkmunĂŒ|goshafagahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafagahmunĂŒ|gokishafagahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafagahmushĂ«|shafagahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafagahnkmushĂ«|goshafagahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafagahmushĂ«|gokishafagahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafagahmuro|shafagahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafagahnkmuro|goshafagahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafagahmuro|gokishafagahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
